nodes.name: Tepui brushfinch
nodes.summary: Tepui brushfinch（Atlapetes personatus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Tepui brushfinch。

nodes.name: Tepui brushfinch
nodes.summary: The tepui brushfinch (Atlapetes personatus) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is found in the tepuis of Brazil, Guyana, and Venezuela. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest between 1,000 and 2,500 meters elevation. References

nodes.name: Atlapetes
nodes.summary: Atlapetes（Atlapetes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联32种鸟类，如Rufous-capped brushfinch、White-naped brushfinch、Yellow-thighed brushfinch等32种鸟类。
